title: acer tschonoskii subsp. australe
intro: Acer tschonoskii subsp. australe is a sub-species of the Japanese Maple tree, specifically native to Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acer tschonoskii subsp. australe are said to include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
